title: Escaped identifier grammar is not the same as the standard
body:
Empty escaped identifier are not supported but are allowed by the Verilog standard A.9.3.

This file is rejected
```
module xorator(input a, b, output \ );
    assign \ = a ^ b;
endmodule
```

I tried fixing it but I don't know how the name encoding/decoding works so my PR might be incomplete.
